map: VIDEO compilation across many areas: Galactic/space (purple void + a white circular space structure, 'Death by space'), red/fire boss arenas, gray dungeon interiors, snowy area, green godlands/realm. 10 area transitions.

bosses.name: Gravedigger (Twilight Necropolis boss)
taunts: Let's see how you handle this...
Death is your reward! Say no more and FINISH...
...your courage softens me. I could grant you a...

mechanics: Announcements seen: 'Skull Shrine has just spawned!', 'The Uvuvwevwevwe has been defeated', a 'Reaper' pet '...has achieved its max level!'. A 'Mummy:' announcer line (Egyptian/Underworld theme).
uncertain: Compilation of short clips → no single dungeon map; biomes identified but not named. Some death-notification lines partial.
confidence: HIGH for the GRAVEDIGGER taunt lines (verbatim, DOCUMENTED) — these belong to Twilight Necropolis. MEDIUM for the event announcements. Biome IDs visual-only.
